channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Parent Cuts Financial Support After Years of Providing $5K Monthly to Adult Child
item.description: The article discusses a parent’s dilemma after providing over $300,000 in financial support to their adult child over five years. The parent, who has been sending monthly transfers, now faces the chal...

item.title: Harry Kane Seeks World Cup Glory and Ballon d’Or Recognition in Crucial Tournament
item.description: Harry Kane, England's record goalscorer, faces a pivotal week in his career as he aims to secure both World Cup glory and a Ballon d’Or win. The Bayern Munich striker has delivered stellar performance...

item.title: Network RV Director Under Investigation for Alleged Insolvent Trading Amid $36M Debt
item.description: The article discusses the investigation into the director of Network RV, a company within the broader network, regarding allegations of insolvent trading. The director is facing scrutiny over potentia...

item.title: US-Iran tensions escalate as Trump abandons Hormuz fee plan amid renewed strikes
item.description: US President Donald Trump has abandoned a proposed 20% transit fee for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, opting instead for trade deals with Gulf states. This decision comes after a series o...

item.title: Democratic lawmakers say U.S. sanctions are worsening Cuba's humanitarian and energy crisis after fact-finding visit
item.description: Four Democratic members of Congress returned from a multi-day visit to Cuba and said they witnessed severe humanitarian conditions that they attributed largely to U.S. sanctions and energy restriction...

item.title: NBI Executive Under Scrutiny for Credibility and Qualifications
item.description: The article discusses the recent scrutiny faced by a senior executive of the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) regarding their credibility and qualifications. Published on July 15, 2026, the piec...

item.title: Overcrowding and Poor Conditions at Lindela Repatriation Centre Amidst Anti-Foreigner Unrest
item.description: The Lindela Repatriation Centre in South Africa is facing severe overcrowding and deteriorating living conditions as thousands of foreign nationals flee the country amid ongoing anti-foreigner unrest....

item.title: Kalangalala Secondary School Dormitory Incident Highlights Safety Concerns
item.description: A secondary school dormitory in Kalangalala narrowly avoided a fire disaster, sparking concerns about safety standards in educational institutions. The incident at Kalangalala Secondary School undersc...

item.title: Nigeria's Super Falcons Prepare for WAFCON with Ghana Friendly
item.description: Nigeria’s Super Falcons are ramping up preparations for the 2026 Women’s Africa Cup of Nations (WAFCON) with a crucial friendly match against Ghana’s Black Queens in Casablanca on July 18. The game, t...

item.title: CBSE Launches 19 Free Online Courses on AI, Python, Cybersecurity and More for School Students
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has taken a wonderful step to help students build skills for the future by offering 19 free online courses. These courses are available for students fro...

item.title: Kruger National Park ranks 10th globally for birdwatching diversity
item.description: A recent study by travel insurer AllClear has ranked the world's top birdwatching destinations, with South Africa's Kruger National Park securing 10th place. The analysis evaluated eight metrics inclu...

item.title: Court Issues Arrest Warrant for PFIPC Director Over Court Appearance Failure
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja has issued an arrest warrant for Adeniyi Adeyemi, the self-proclaimed Director-General of the Presidential Foreign Investment Promotion Council (PFIPC), after he failed...

item.title: Albanese Launches National AI Oversight to Address Risks and Opportunities
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has established an Office of AI within his Department of the Prime Minister and Cabinet to oversee Australia’s approach to artificial intelligence. The initiative, anno...

item.title: Norfolk County Barn Fire Claims 20,000 Hogs
item.description: A devastating fire at a barn in Norfolk County, Ontario, resulted in the deaths of approximately 20,000 hogs, according to recent reports. The incident, which occurred on July 14, 2026, has raised con...

item.title: Catholic Priest Studying Law at Nairobi University Dies, Church Mourns
item.description: The Catholic Diocese of Meru has announced the sudden death of Fr. Eric Mucheri, a dedicated priest who was studying law at the University of Nairobi's Parklands Campus. He resided at St. Augustine Pa...

item.title: Arsenal Completes Transfer of Leandro Trossard to Turkish Club Besiktas
item.description: Arsenal has officially completed the transfer of Belgian forward Leandro Trossard to Turkish club Besiktas. The deal marks a significant change in Arsenal's attacking options as Trossard, who joined f...

item.title: NBI defends investigation despite clerical errors in Duterte threat case
item.description: The defense team of Vice President Sara Duterte criticized the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) for typographical errors in its affidavit of investigation regarding her alleged threats against P...

item.title: Escudero pwersa na ang impeachment hearing ay di pwede i-consider na debate universitario
item.description: Senator Francis Escudero nagsalita sa korte para i-remind ang mga miyembro ng defense at prosecution na ang impeachment hearing ay di pwede i-consider na isang debate universitario. Ang kausap niya ay...

item.title: Sexual extortion targeting young Australian men: eSafety Commission report highlights rising threat
item.description: The eSafety Commission has warned of a surge in sexual extortion targeting young Australian men, with sophisticated criminal networks using technology to blackmail victims. A third transparency report...

item.title: Wildfires Continue Across UK Amid Heatwave and Firefighter Challenges
item.description: Wildfires continue to burn across the UK, with firefighters facing extreme pressure due to a prolonged heatwave. The National Fire Chiefs Council (NFCC) chair, Phil Garrigan, warned that dry weather h...
